overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through Night City's neon-lit downtown streets at night. The vehicle travels through covered urban corridors, graffiti-covered underpasses, and intersections with wet reflective roads, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy neon lighting and atmospheric haze.

events.description: approaching descent ramp leading into underpass tunnel

agents.ego_description: driving forward under the concrete overpass, approaching the tunnel entrance with neon-lit shops visible on the left

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near a food stall on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete overpass covering the entire street with visible support beams
bright yellow metal barriers lining the right side of the road
illuminated storefront with traditional Asian architectural elements and signage
red and green neon tubes attached to the overpass ceiling casting colored light

segments.scene_description: Driving beneath a massive concrete overpass in a neon-lit commercial district. The street is wet and reflective, with yellow guardrails on the right and illuminated shop fronts on the left. A group of pedestrians stands near a food stall as the vehicle approaches a descent ramp into an underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered underpass ramp with red concrete walls

events.description: entering enclosed underpass with bright red concrete walls and graffiti
navigating curved ramp while descending into lower level

agents.ego_description: driving down the curved concrete ramp into the underground tunnel section

entered.detail: bright red painted concrete walls covered in graffiti and street art
large colorful graffiti artwork covering the tunnel walls
downward sloping road leading into the underground level

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends into a narrow, enclosed underpass with striking red concrete walls covered in vibrant graffiti. The space is artificially lit with overhead lights, and the road curves as it goes deeper underground. No pedestrians are visible in this tunnel section.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower city roadway transitioning from tunnel to commercial district

events.description: exiting tunnel and ascending ramp back to street level
passing green vehicle while merging into city traffic

agents.ego_description: ascending from the underpass and merging into light city traffic on wet roads

notable_agents.action: green car driving in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with reflective puddles and street lighting
large illuminated digital advertising screens on building facades
tall lamp posts with bright white illumination

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel onto a wet city street with reflective asphalt. The environment transitions from enclosed graffiti walls to open commercial areas with large digital billboards. The vehicle passes a green car while ascending the ramp, with street lights illuminating the hazy night air.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with commercial signage and pedestrian crossings

events.description: turning right at large intersection with crosswalks
navigating through intersection with pedestrians waiting at corners

agents.ego_description: navigating through multiple intersections, turning corners while observing traffic and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrians waiting at crosswalk corner to cross the street

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
tall urban structures with bright neon signage and storefronts
large red neon sign reading STUDIOS mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: Driving through wide urban intersections with prominent crosswalks and heavy neon signage. Pedestrians wait at corners while the vehicle navigates turns. The STUDIOS neon sign is visible on the left as the camera moves through the commercial district with moderate traffic and wet reflective streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial district with red atmospheric lighting and final underpass

events.description: entering industrial zone with red atmospheric lighting and dust particles
entering final underpass tunnel with concrete walls

agents.ego_description: driving through industrial area with reduced visibility from dust and red lighting, then entering final tunnel

entered.detail: concrete industrial structures with minimal exterior lighting
ambient red glow with visible dust particles creating hazy atmosphere
concrete tunnel entrance with overhead cover and artificial lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into an industrial district characterized by red atmospheric lighting and dusty haze. The vehicle passes through areas with reduced visibility before entering a final concrete underpass. The environment shifts from commercial neon to industrial red tones, with concrete walls enclosing the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a neon-lit commercial district that gradually transitions into a hazy industrial zone. It begins beneath a massive concrete overpass on a wet, reflective street, passing illuminated shop fronts and pedestrians before descending a ramp into a narrow underpass. As the vehicle moves deeper underground, the environment shifts into an enclosed tunnel of red concrete walls covered in vibrant graffiti, which then opens back up into the city air as the camera ascends past digital billboards and other traffic. The scene expands into wide urban intersections filled with heavy neon signage and crosswalks, moving past a prominent STUDIOS sign under a hazy night sky. Finally, the commercial glow fades as the vehicle enters an industrial district, where the lighting shifts to deep red tones and dusty haze before the road is enclosed once more by a final concrete underpass.
